Son Ye Jin is Voted by Netizens as the ‘Most Beautiful Woman of 2020’


South Korean actress Son Ye Jin was voted by the public as the “Most Beautiful Woman of 2020” via a series of online and social media polls conducted by Starmometer from April 4 to May 22, 2020. The “Crash Landing on You” star garnered a grand total of 4,354,037 votes from Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and Online Poll.

Son Ye Jin ruled in three platforms (Instagram 2, Facebook 1 and Facebook 2) to win the battle for people’s votes. Her biggest rival was Thailand’s Lalisa Manoban who topped three platforms as well (Instagram 1, Twitter, and Online Poll). But after all the votes from six platforms were combined, the South Korean actress emerged as this year’s winner.

Son Ye Jin is a veteran actress in the land of K-pop and K-dramas and her career started to take off in as early as 2003 when she starred in the movie “The Classic” which was also shown in Hong Kong and China. Her popularity continues to rise after starring in romance-themed movies and TV series such as “Summer Scent” (2003), “A Moment to Remember” (2004), and “April Snow” (2005). When it comes to awards, she was recognized for her versatility in diverse genres like in “Alone in Love” (2006), “My Wife Got Married” (2008), “The Pirates” (2014) and the 2016 films “The Truth Beneath” and “The Last Princess.”

In the age of Netflix, Son Je Jin recently scored 2 global hits namely “Something in the Rain” and “Crash Landing on You.” Her notable leading men include Kim Joo-hyuk, So Ji-Sub, Jung Hae-In, Hyun Bin, and former boyfriend Lee Min Ho.

Congratulations to the new winner of the “Most Beautiful Woman” title, Son Ye Jin!

原文：https://starmometer.com/2020/05/22/son-ye-jin-is-voted-by-netizens-as-most-beautiful-woman-of-2020-sonyejinmostbeautifulwoman2020/
